patch.value: Drift-scan cache can false-hit on mtime-preserving file copies
history-drift-cache keys on mtime+ctime+size; rsync --archive / cp -p can preserve these and suppress re-verification of a tampered/broken stream -> silent false-ok from pm health.

Add optional content-hash column populated after a cache miss; on hit, O(1) recompute+compare before trusting cached chain_ok; health correctly invalidates an mtime-preserved replaced file; no normal-path latency regression.
history-drift-cache keys on mtime+ctime+size; rsync --archive / cp -p can preserve these and suppress re-verification of a tampered/broken stream -> silent false-ok from pm health.
